title: Fix score model test after unused import cleanup

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Python CI fails because test_score patches plexus.dashboard.api.models.score.get_score_yaml_path after the unused import was removed. Updating the test to patch the live plexus.cli.shared dependency path.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Updated test_error_handling_api_failures to patch plexus.cli.shared.get_score_yaml_path, matching the live dependency after removing the unused score.py import. Focused pytest, py_compile, and flake8 fatal-error selection passed.
